ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "parent_commit" TEXT /* SHA hash of the parent commit */,
  "current_commit" TEXT /* SHA hash of the current commit */,
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committer who made the commit */,
  "committed_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the commit was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., M for modification, A for addition, D for deletion) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch where the commit was made */,
  "merge_request_id" TEXT /* ID of the merge request associated with the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Log message associated with the commit */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells identified in the commit */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Test coverage percentage of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES committer ("committer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "test_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the test file is associated with */,
  "parent_test_file" TEXT /* Path to the parent test file */,
  "current_test_file" TEXT /* Path to the current test file */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the test file */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Test coverage percentage of the test file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prod_files" (
  "prod_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the production file is associated with */,
  "parent_prod_file" TEXT /* Path to the parent production file */,
  "current_prod_file" TEXT /* Path to the current production file */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells identified in the production file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the production file was last modified */,
  "code_complexity" INTEGER /* Code complexity of the production file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prod_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prod_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committer" (
  "committer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committer */,
  "committer_name" TEXT /* Name of the committer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the committer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the committer (e.g., developer, QA engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the committer */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the committer joined the company */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity of the committer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_smells" (
  "test_smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test smell */,
  "test_smell_name" TEXT /* Name of the test smell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test smell */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the test smell (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "suggested_fix" TEXT /* Suggested fix for the test smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_smell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_test_smells" (
  "commit_test_smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test smell occurrence */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit associated with the test smell */,
  "test_smell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test smell */,
  "occurance_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the test smell occurs in the commit */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the test smell occurs */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the test smell occurs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_test_smell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_test_smells_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_test_smells_test_smell_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_smell_id") REFERENCES test_smells ("test_smell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the project is stored */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_projects" (
  "commit_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit-project association */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Log message associated with the commit in the project */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Test coverage percentage of the commit in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_projects_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit log */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message associated with the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch where the commit was made */,
  "merge_request_id" TEXT /* ID of the merge request associated with the commit */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit */,
  "code_smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells identified in the commit */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Test coverage percentage of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_logs_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)
